text:
Created attachment 234356
a patch for update to 0.60.1

Update to 0.60.1, add/remove some dependencies.

To update, you should update following PRs, before.
* https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=264250
* https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=264362
* https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=264362
